# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/build-tests
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Allows to build against installed SPIRV-Tools-opt. This is unsupported
// if the commit isn't the one in known_good.json
ALLOW_EXTERNAL_SPIRV_TOOLS:BOOL=OFF

//The ALSA (asound) include directory
ALSA_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//The ALSA (asound) library
ALSA_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libasound.so

//Enable ALSA backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_ALSA:BOOL=ON

//Enable CoreAudio backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_COREAUDIO:BOOL=ON

//Enable JACK backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_JACK:BOOL=ON

ALSOFT_BACKEND_NULL:BOOL=ON

//Enable Oboe backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_OBOE:BOOL=ON

//Enable OpenSL backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_OPENSL:BOOL=ON

//Enable OSS backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_OSS:BOOL=ON

//Enable PipeWire backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_PIPEWIRE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable PortAudio backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_PORTAUDIO:BOOL=ON

//Enable PulseAudio backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_PULSEAUDIO:BOOL=ON

//Enable SDL2 backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_SDL2:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SDL3 backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_SDL3:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SndIO backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_SNDIO:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Solaris backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_SOLARIS:BOOL=ON

//Enable Wave Writer backend
ALSOFT_BACKEND_WAVE:BOOL=ON

//Enable ARM NEON support
ALSOFT_CPUEXT_NEON:BOOL=ON

//Enable SSE support
ALSOFT_CPUEXT_SSE:BOOL=ON

//Enable SSE2 support

ALSOFT_DLOPEN:BOOL=ON

//Record dlopen dependencies in .note.dlopen section
ALSOFT_DLOPEN_NOTES:BOOL=ON

//Enable legacy EAX extensions
ALSOFT_EAX:BOOL=OFF

//Embed the HRTF data files (increases library footprint)
ALSOFT_EMBED_HRTF_DATA:BOOL=ON

//Enable use of C++20 modules when supported
ALSOFT_ENABLE_MODULES:BOOL=OFF

//Build example programs
ALSOFT_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//ASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Debug

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-15

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.

FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content

FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_GOOGLETEST:PATH=

FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_ZLIB:PATH=

FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of fmt
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_FMT:BOOL=OFF

FT_DISABLE_BROTLI:BOOL=ON

//Disable support of bzip2 compressed fonts.
FT_DISABLE_BZIP2:BOOL=ON

//Disable support of PNG compressed OpenType embedded bitmaps.
FT_DISABLE_PNG:BOOL=ON

//Disable use of system zlib and use internal zlib library instead.
FT_DISABLE_ZLIB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable support for meaningful error descriptions.
FT_ENABLE_ERROR_STRINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Require system zlib instead of internal zlib library.
FT_REQUIRE_ZLIB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable OpenCL for more GPU information
HWINFO_GPU_OPENCL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable mainboard information
HWINFO_MAINBOARD:BOOL=ON

//Enable network information
HWINFO_NETWORK:BOOL=ON

//Enable OS information
HWINFO_OS:BOOL=ON

//Enable RAM information
HWINFO_RAM:BOOL=ON

//Shared build
HWINFO_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//Enable installation of googletest. (Projects embedding googletest
// may want to turn this OFF.)
INSTALL_GTEST:BOOL=ON

//Install project
INSTALL_PROJECT:BOOL=OFF

//Copy minigzip and minideflate during install
INSTALL_UTILS:BOOL=OFF

//The JACK include directory
JACK_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
JACK_LIB:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjack.so

//The JACK library
JACK_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjack.so

//Enable CI build targets.
JSON_CI:BOOL=OFF

//Enable diagnostic positions.
JSON_Diagnostic_Positions:BOOL=OFF

//Use extended diagnostic messages.
JSON_Diagnostics:BOOL=OFF

//Disable default integer enum serialization.
JSON_DisableEnumSerialization:BOOL=OFF

//Place user-defined string literals in the global namespace.
JSON_GlobalUDLs:BOOL=ON

//Enable implicit conversions.
JSON_ImplicitConversions:BOOL=ON

//Install CMake targets during install step.
JSON_Install:BOOL=OFF

//Enable legacy discarded value comparison.
JSON_LegacyDiscardedValueComparison:BOOL=OFF

//Use non-amalgamated version of the library.
JSON_MultipleHeaders:BOOL=ON

//Include as system headers (skip for clang-tidy).
JSON_SystemInclude:BOOL=OFF

LIBRESSL_APPS:BOOL=OFF

LIBRESSL_INSTALL_CMAKEDIR:STRING=lib/cmake/LibreSSL

//Skip installation
LIBRESSL_SKIP_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

//Build tests
LIBRESSL_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build Shared Libraries for libusb

SDL_ALSA_SHARED:BOOL=ON

//Use AddressSanitizer to detect memory errors

SDL_ASSERTIONS:STRING=auto

SDL_AUDIO:BOOL=ON

//Use AVX assembly routines
SDL_AVX:BOOL=ON

//Use AVX2 assembly routines

//Use AVX512F assembly routines

//number to use for magic backgrounding signal or 'OFF'

//Use Ccache to speed up build

//Extra link options (for CMAKE_REQUIRED_LINK_OPTIONS)

//Use clock_gettime() instead of gettimeofday()

//Detected architecture ARM64

//Detected architecture X86

//Build example

//Build shared library

//Build tests
SPDLOG_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable compiler warnings

//Use CLOCK_REALTIME_COARSE instead of the regular clock,
SPDLOG_CLOCK_COARSE:BOOL=OFF

//Filename postfix for libraries in debug builds (empty string
// allowed)
SPDLOG_DEBUG_POSTFIX:STRING=-2.0d

//Use external fmt library instead of of fetching from gitub.
SPDLOG_FMT_EXTERNAL:BOOL=OFF

//Generate the install target
SPDLOG_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable/disable MSVC /utf-8 flag (recommended for fmt)
SPDLOG_MSVC_UTF8:BOOL=ON

//prevent spdlog from querying the thread id on each log call if
// thread id is not needed
SPDLOG_NO_THREAD_ID:BOOL=OFF

//Disable thread local storage
SPDLOG_NO_TLS:BOOL=OFF

//Omit %z timezone offset (use on platforms without tm_gmtoff /
// full offset)
SPDLOG_NO_TZ_OFFSET:BOOL=OFF

//Prevent from child processes to inherit log file descriptors
SPDLOG_PREVENT_CHILD_FD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable address sanitizer for the spdlog library and anything
// that links it
SPDLOG_SANITIZE_ADDRESS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable thread sanitizer for the spdlog library and anything that
// links it
SPDLOG_SANITIZE_THREAD:BOOL=OFF

SPDLOG_TIDY:BOOL=OFF

//non supported option
SPDLOG_WCHAR_CONSOLE:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake

//Test SPIRV-Headers
SPIRV_HEADERS_ENABLE_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//enable access check feature (beta)
TOML11_ENABLE_ACCESS_CHECK:BOOL=OFF

//precompile toml11 library
TOML11_PRECOMPILE:BOOL=OFF

//Enforce callstack collection for tracy regions
TRACY_CALLSTACK:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build Tracy python client library
TRACY_CLIENT_PYTHON:BOOL=OFF

//Enable delayed initialization of the library (init on first call)
TRACY_DELAYED_INIT:BOOL=OFF

//[advanced] Don't use default demangling function - You'll need
// to provide your own
TRACY_DEMANGLE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable profiling
TRACY_ENABLE:BOOL=ON

//Enable fibers support
TRACY_FIBERS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libbacktrace to support dynamically loaded elfs in symbol
// resolution resolution after the first symbol resolve operation
TRACY_LIBBACKTRACE_ELF_DYNLOAD_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//Use libunwind backtracing where supported
TRACY_LIBUNWIND_BACKTRACE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the manual lifetime management of the profile
TRACY_MANUAL_LIFETIME:BOOL=OFF

//Disable client discovery by broadcast to local network
TRACY_NO_BROADCAST:BOOL=OFF

//Disable all callstack related functionality
TRACY_NO_CALLSTACK:BOOL=ON

//Disables the inline functions in callstacks
TRACY_NO_CALLSTACK_INLINES:BOOL=OFF

//Disable collection of source code
TRACY_NO_CODE_TRANSFER:BOOL=ON

//Disable capture of context switches
TRACY_NO_CONTEXT_SWITCH:BOOL=ON

//Disable crash handling
TRACY_NO_CRASH_HANDLER:BOOL=ON

//Client executable does not exit until all profile data is sent
// to server
TRACY_NO_EXIT:BOOL=OFF

//Disable the frame image support and its thread
TRACY_NO_FRAME_IMAGE:BOOL=ON

//Disable call stack sampling
TRACY_NO_SAMPLING:BOOL=ON

//Disable systrace sampling
TRACY_NO_SYSTEM_TRACING:BOOL=ON

//Disable zone validation for C API
TRACY_NO_VERIFY:BOOL=OFF

//Disable capture of hardware Vsync events
TRACY_NO_VSYNC_CAPTURE:BOOL=OFF

//Tracy will only accept connections on IPv4 addresses (disable
// IPv6)
TRACY_ONLY_IPV4:BOOL=OFF

//Only listen on the localhost interface
TRACY_ONLY_LOCALHOST:BOOL=ON

//On-demand profiling
TRACY_ON_DEMAND:BOOL=ON

//Enable nopsleds for efficient patching by system-level tools
// (e.g. rr)
TRACY_PATCHABLE_NOPSLEDS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build Tracy as a static library
TRACY_STATIC:BOOL=ON

//Instead of full runtime symbol resolution, only resolve the image
// path and offset to enable offline symbol resolution
TRACY_SYMBOL_OFFLINE_RESOLVE:BOOL=OFF

//Use lower resolution timers
TRACY_TIMER_FALLBACK:BOOL=OFF

//[advanced] Verbose output from the profiler
TRACY_VERBOSE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable install target
TSL_ROBIN_MAP_ENABLE_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Dependencies for the target
TracyClient_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;dl;

Tracy_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/build-tests/externals/tracy

//Enables building of the Vulkan C++20 module with import std;
// requires minimum CMake version 3.30

VULKAN_HEADERS_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/externals/vulkan-headers

//When enabled, compiles with `-Werror` (on *nix platforms).
WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a library.
WAYLAND_CLIENT_LIB:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libwayland-client.so

//Path to a library.
WAYLAND_CURSOR_LIB:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libwayland-cursor.so

WITH_AVX2:BOOL=ON

//Build with AVX512
WITH_AVX512:BOOL=ON

//Build with AVX512 VNNI extensions
WITH_AVX512VNNI:BOOL=ON

//Build test/benchmarks
WITH_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

//Build application benchmarks
WITH_BENCHMARK_APPS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable code coverage reporting
WITH_CODE_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable optimized CRC32 algorithm Chorba
WITH_CRC32_CHORBA:BOOL=ON

//Build test/fuzz
WITH_FUZZERS:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with support for gzFile related functions
WITH_GZFILEOP:BOOL=ON

//Build with zero fill for inflate invalid distances
WITH_INFLATE_ALLOW_INVALID_DIST:BOOL=OFF

//Build with strict inflate distance checking
WITH_INFLATE_STRICT:BOOL=OFF

//Build with project maintainer warnings
WITH_MAINTAINER_WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Instruct the compiler to use the full instruction set on this
// host (gcc/clang -march=native)
WITH_NATIVE_INSTRUCTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Build with optimisation
WITH_OPTIM:BOOL=ON

//Build with PCLMULQDQ
WITH_PCLMULQDQ:BOOL=ON

//Reduced memory usage for special cases (reduces performance)
WITH_REDUCED_MEM:BOOL=OFF

//Build with runtime detection of CPU architecture
WITH_RUNTIME_CPU_DETECTION:BOOL=ON

//Enable sanitizer support
WITH_SANITIZER:STRING=AUTO

//Build with SSE2
WITH_SSE2:BOOL=ON

//Build with SSE42
WITH_SSE42:BOOL=ON

//Build with SSSE3
WITH_SSSE3:BOOL=ON

//Build with VPCLMULQDQ
WITH_VPCLMULQDQ:BOOL=ON

//Path to a file.
X11_ICE_INCLUDE_PATH:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
X11_ICE_LIB:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libICE.so

//Path to a file.
X11_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
X11_LIB:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so

//Test zlib-ng specific API
ZLIBNG_ENABLE_TESTS:BOOL=ON

//Compile with zlib compatible API
ZLIB_COMPAT:BOOL=ON

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for ZLIB.
ZLIB_DIR:PATH=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/build-tests/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//Give this prefix to all publicly exported symbols.
//\nUseful when embedding into a larger library.
//\nDefault is no prefix (empty prefix).
ZLIB_SYMBOL_PREFIX:STRING=

//Enable developer mode (-Wall, -Werror, ...)
ZYAN_DEV_MODE:BOOL=OFF

//Forces asserts in release builds.
ZYAN_FORCE_ASSERTS:BOOL=OFF

//Don't use any C standard library functions (for exotic build-envs
// like kernel drivers)
ZYAN_NO_LIBC:BOOL=OFF

//Force using system installed Zycore library
ZYAN_SYSTEM_ZYCORE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable whole program optimization (all targets)
ZYAN_WHOLE_PROGRAM_OPTIMIZATION:BOOL=OFF

//The path to look for Zycore
ZYAN_ZYCORE_PATH:PATH=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/externals/zydis/dependencies/zycore

//Build examples
ZYCORE_BUILD_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Build shared library
ZYCORE_BUILD_SHARED_LIB:BOOL=OFF

//Build tests
ZYCORE_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build doxygen documentation (requires Doxygen)
ZYDIS_BUILD_DOXYGEN:BOOL=OFF

//Build examples
ZYDIS_BUILD_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Build manpages for the tools (requires Ronn-NG)
ZYDIS_BUILD_MAN:BOOL=OFF

//Build shared library
ZYDIS_BUILD_SHARED_LIB:BOOL=OFF

//Build tests
ZYDIS_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build tools
ZYDIS_BUILD_TOOLS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable support for AVX-512 instructions
ZYDIS_FEATURE_AVX512:BOOL=ON

//Enable instruction decoding functionality
ZYDIS_FEATURE_DECODER:BOOL=ON

//Enable instruction encoding functionality
ZYDIS_FEATURE_ENCODER:BOOL=ON

//Enable instruction formatting functionality
ZYDIS_FEATURE_FORMATTER:BOOL=ON

//Enable support for KNC instructions
ZYDIS_FEATURE_KNC:BOOL=ON

//Enable instruction segment API
ZYDIS_FEATURE_SEGMENT:BOOL=ON

//Enables AFL persistent mode and reduces prints in ZydisFuzzIn
ZYDIS_FUZZ_AFL_FAST:BOOL=OFF

//Enables LLVM libfuzzer mode and reduces prints in ZydisFuzzIn
ZYDIS_LIBFUZZER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable minimal mode (forces ZYDIS_DECODER_MODE_MINIMAL runtime
// option)
ZYDIS_MINIMAL_MODE:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Zycore_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/build-tests/externals/zydis/zycore

//Value Computed by CMake
Zycore_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Zycore_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/externals/zydis/dependencies/zycore

//Value Computed by CMake
Zydis_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/build-tests/externals/zydis

//Value Computed by CMake
Zydis_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Dependencies for the target
Zydis_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;Zycore::Zycore;

//Value Computed by CMake
Zydis_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/externals/zydis

//Dependencies for the target
discord-rpc_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;pthread;

//Value Computed by CMake
gtest_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/jica/repo/Bachata-S4/build-tests/_deps/googletest-src/googletest

//Build gtest's sample programs.
gtest_build_samples:BOOL=OFF

//Build all of gtest's own tests.
gtest_build_tests:BOOL=OFF

//Disable uses of pthreads in gtest.
gtest_disable_pthreads:BOOL=OFF

//Use shared (DLL) run-time lib even when Google Test is built
// as static lib.
gtest_force_shared_crt:BOOL=OFF

//Build gtest with internal symbols hidden in shared libraries.
gtest_hide_internal_symbols:BOOL=OFF

IBUS_CFLAGS_I:INTERNAL=
IBUS_CFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=-pthread
IBUS_FOUND:INTERNAL=1
IBUS_INCLUDEDIR:INTERNAL=/usr/include
IBUS_INCLUDE_DIRS:INTERNAL=/usr/include/ibus-1.0;/usr/include;/usr/include/glib-2.0;/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/glib-2.0/include;/usr/include/libmount;/usr/include/blkid;/usr/include/sysprof-6
IBUS_LDFLAGS:INTERNAL=-L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu;-libus-1.0;-lgio-2.0;-lgobject-2.0;-lglib-2.0
IBUS_LDFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
IBUS_LIBDIR:INTERNAL=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu
IBUS_LIBRARIES:INTERNAL=ibus-1.0;gio-2.0;gobject-2.0;glib-2.0
IBUS_LIBRARY_DIRS:INTERNAL=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu

IBUS_LIBS_L:INTERNAL=
IBUS_LIBS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
IBUS_LIBS_PATHS:INTERNAL=
IBUS_MODULE_NAME:INTERNAL=ibus-1.0
IBUS_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/usr
IBUS_STATIC_CFLAGS:INTERNAL=-I/usr/include/ibus-1.0;-I/usr/include;-I/usr/include/glib-2.0;-I/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/glib-2.0/include;-I/usr/include/libmount;-I/usr/include/blkid;-I/usr/include/sysprof-6;-pthread
IBUS_STATIC_CFLAGS_I:INTERNAL=
IBUS_STATIC_CFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=-pthread
IBUS_STATIC_INCLUDE_DIRS:INTERNAL=/usr/include/ibus-1.0;/usr/include;/usr/include/glib-2.0;/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/glib-2.0/include;/usr/include/libmount;/usr/include/blkid;/usr/include/sysprof-6
IBUS_STATIC_LDFLAGS:INTERNAL=-L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu;-libus-1.0;-lgio-2.0;-lgobject-2.0;-lffi;-lgmodule-2.0;-pthread;-lglib-2.0;-latomic;-lm;-lz;-lmount;-ldl;-lblkid;-L/usr/lib;-lselinux;-lsepol;-lpcre2-8;-lsysprof-capture-4;-Wl,-z,nodelete;-pthread
IBUS_STATIC_LDFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=-pthread;-Wl,-z,nodelete;-pthread
IBUS_STATIC_LIBDIR:INTERNAL=

LIBC_HAS_STRNCMP:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol strnlen
LIBC_HAS_STRNLEN:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol strnstr
LIBC_HAS_STRNSTR:INTERNAL=
//Have symbol strpbrk
LIBC_HAS_STRPBRK:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol strrchr
LIBC_HAS_STRRCHR:INTERNAL=1
//Have symbol strstr
